nasb.text: All who handle the oar, The sailors and all the pilots of the sea Will come down from their ships; They will stand on the land,

esv.text: and down from their ships come all who handle the oar. The mariners and all the pilots of the sea stand on the land

cnv.text: 所有蕩槳的、 水手和航海的舵手， 都必離開他們的船隻， 站在陸上。

ccb.text: 所有的船夫、水手、舵手都必弃船登岸，
